title: Liquidraw Adjustable Set Square 8" / 20 cm - Angle Line with Bevel Edge | Clear Acrylic with Sloped, Diagonal Edge | Durable Acrylic & Markings | Storage Pouch Included | Professional or DIY
features: ACCURATE ANGLES: Designed for clarity & control, this adjustable set square ensures accurate 90° & 45° angle markings; made from clear, sturdy acrylic, it is ideal for manual work that requires precision & perfection
MULTIPLE SIZES: Choose the size that best suits the project at hand with 4 options; choose from 20 cm, 25 cm, 30 cm, or 35 cm lengths to match your specific task needs
SEE-THROUGH: The 2.8 mm thick, transparent acrylic & bevel edge allows easy visibility when working with easy to read markings; no need to move the set square to see beneath; ideal for measuring
SCHOOL & WORK: Whether used for DIY, in a GCSE maths classroom or a professional construction workshop, this set square is a useful addition to any math set, drawing kit, or carpentry tool collection
WORKPLACE MATE: From measuring wood angles to drawing architectural plans, this square is ideal for joiners, builders, interior designers, carpenters, architects, engineers, student & woodworkers
